title: Heroes of Time
description:
Примечания к обновлению

Об игреChrono warriors unite, in a battle across eras to save humanity's fate from the clutches of time-bending villains and dark powers.

A classic RPG, mixing sci-fi + fantasy. Venture as Henzo and his friends to go after a scentist who wants to distort the timeline. Travel to the past and face some medieval creatures in your way as three young teens from the future! 

This game takes place 1000 years after the events of Tales of Ágaris, in the year of 2130.
 

Long forgotten are days of strife and conflict. Robots have been manufactured to assist with the police to keep the peace and security of the lands. Yet, not all is quite tranquil.

A scientist, named, Aizack, uses his own robots to fuel a machine that he build to go back in time. To make the world one of his own design, he aims to steal a certain magical necklace that has lost it's potency in the modern age. However, 1000 years ago, it had the capability of summoning extremely powerful demons.

The era that Aizack needs to visit coincides with the emergence of Gorgos, which was a dark moment in history. Henzo, Willie, and Lenna discover the scientist's plans and decide that he needs to be stopped. Both to preserve the present that they know, and to protect the future that they don't know.

 Would the three teens be able to nullify Aizack? Are you ready to travel in the time and save the future?

Key Features:

• Fast-Paced, Turn-Based Combat: Enjoy the simplicity and speed of classic turn-based battles. Strategic decisions keep the action engaging without slowing down the pace.

• Unique Limit Breaks: Each character has their own special Limit abilities, which charge up when they take damage in battle. Unleash these powerful moves with unique animations that highlight each hero's strengths.

• Multi-Purpose Smartphone: Henzo’s smartphone serves as more than just a communication device. It acts as a detailed menu that includes a Bestiary of all monsters encountered, a log of items found, and a list of learned abilities, all at your fingertips.

• Exclusive Monster Minigame: Face off against a growing list of 16 unique monsters in a special battle mode, with increasing rewards for each victory. Test your skills and see how far you can go for better loot!

• Selfies with Henzo: Capture special moments by taking selfies in different locations. It’s not all about saving the world—have some fun along the way!

• Custom Soundtrack Control: Use the in-game phone to play your favorite music as you explore the world, or even switch up the battle theme to fit your mood. Music is at your command wherever you go!
description_short: Join young adventurers from the future on a quest through time, battling ancient evils and futuristic threats to save the world.

upsells.name: Heroes of Time 1st Anniversary Special: Exclusive Art Collection
